name: mind-fight-club
description: MFC — club league for the mind

scripts.check:all: npm run check:syntax && npm run check:legacy && npm run check:duplicates

notes.legacy.js: legacy.js loads synchronously BEFORE the ES modules (app.js). It declares bare variables (sb, track, etc.) as local shims. The real implementations (from services/supabase.js, services/analytics.js, etc.) are set on window.* by ES modules after DOMContentLoaded. legacy.js defers actual use of these globals until after page load via window._sbReady setter and _syncStateToLegacy(). Do NOT swap the order — legacy.js must load first so its variables are declared before inline onclick handlers fire.
